flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Moberly Area Community College fell 25% between 2006 and 2009 (38.6% → 28.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Moberly Area Community College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.0k → $2.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Moberly Area Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).
